title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Sanji, Chiffon, Unknown person #2, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #3 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's the cake squad up to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: wasn't the culprit behind the mutiny.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her husband, gang bege, is the one to blame!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know what people think of me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My, my, lady pudding, all that's happened today!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think your joyous wedding celebration was dashed

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: by the barging in of the straw hats and bege's revolt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... but there's no helping what's already happened!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: And Mama's flown into such a rage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. Her rage and hunger may yet destroy this country itself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As the bride, you were the one affected the most by this incident, and yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let Mama Des- Troy this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've begun the initial prepara- Tions!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: towns- people, I have a request for all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're betting our lives, and the very fate of this country, on this cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to be able to focus as best as we can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, do not peek inside the factory during the preparations!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And do not allow anyone that arrives here, regardless of who they may be, to peek, either!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Okay! We hear you, Lady pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Come in one at a time, please!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I drew up a diagram for the design of the cake while I was wrapped up in there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You remember what it looked like?!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
